title: GEP Hub & Integration
description: A2A protocol, bridge, hub search, directory client, mailbox transport, signals, and personality

modules.name: a2a
modules.note: A2A asset eligibility, confidence manipulation, and input parsing
key_logic: Allowed asset types: Gene, Capsule, EvolutionEvent
Capsule eligible if score >= 0.7, safe blast radius, success streak >= 2
Gene eligible if has id (string), non-empty strategy[], non-empty validation[]
lowerConfidence sets a2a.status='external_candidate', applies confidence factor (default 0.6)

modules.name: a2aProtocol
modules.note: OBFUSCATED - API recovered from tests and consumer imports. Core GEP A2A protocol engine.
exported_functions: buildHello({name?}): ProtocolMessage  — includes env_fingerprint, name max 32 chars
buildPublish({asset}): ProtocolMessage  — requires asset.type + asset.id, adds signature
sendHeartbeat(): Promise<{ok}>  — POSTs to hub, touches evolver_loop.log

modules.name: bridge
modules.note: Spawns agent sessions and writes prompt artifacts for GEP cycles
exported_functions: clip(text, maxChars): string  — truncates with [TRUNCATED] marker
writePromptArtifact({memoryDir, cycleId, runId, prompt, meta}): {promptPath, metaPath}
renderSessionsSpawnCall({task, agentId, label, cleanup}): string  — returns 'sessions_spawn({...})'

modules.name: directoryClient
modules.note: Async HTTP client for hub agent capability directory. Semantic + keyword search.
exported_functions: searchByQuery(query, opts?): Promise<{nodeId, score, domains, reputation}[]|null>
getAgentProfile(nodeId): Promise<{nodeId, domains, modelType, reputation, completedTasks, currentLoad, online}|null>
discoverForTask(task, opts?): Promise<Array|null>  — delegates to searchByQuery or searchBySignals

modules.name: hubSearch
modules.note: OBFUSCATED (minified single-line). Hub search with TTL-based cache and LRU eviction.
inferred_behavior: Has a fixed-capacity cache (Map-based with LRU/FIFO eviction)
Calls hub search endpoint, caches results by query key
Used by: explore.js, memoryGraph.js, solidify.js, mutation.js, evolve.js

modules.name: mailboxTransport
modules.note: HTTP transport adapter routing A2A messages through local proxy server
modules.config: Routes to local proxy URL from settings.json; timeout=10000ms

modules.name: signals
modules.note: 3-layer signal extraction pipeline from session context (regex + keyword scoring + LLM)
constants: OPPORTUNITY_SIGNALS (19 signals): user_feature_request, user_improvement_suggestion, perf_bottleneck, capability_gap, stable_success_plateau, external_opportunity, recurring_error, unsupported_input_type, evolution_stagnation_detected, repair_loop_detected, force_innovation_after_repair_loop, tool_bypass, curriculum_target, issue_already_resolved, openclaw_self_healed, empty_cycle_loop_detected, explore_opportunity, hub_search_miss_with_problem, plateau_pivot_required, plateau_pivot_suggested
exported_functions: extractSignals({recentSessionTranscript, todayLog, memorySnippet, userSnippet, recentEvents}): string[]
analyzeRecentHistory(recentEvents): {suppressedSignals, recentIntents, consecutiveRepairCount, emptyCycleCount, consecutiveEmptyCycles, consecutiveFailureCount, recentFailureRatio, geneFreq}
post_processing_rules: Removes cosmetic signals when actionable signals exist
De-duplicates signals over-represented in recent history
Injects plateau_pivot_required (avg<0.35) or plateau_pivot_suggested (avg<0.55) from score trends
Fallback: stable_success_plateau if no signals emitted

modules.name: personality
modules.note: OBFUSCATED. Manages agent personality state for GEP cycle tuning and stats tracking.
exported_functions: personalityKey(ps): string  — encodes personality state as string key

key_relationships: a2aProtocol provides: transport registry, message builders, hub connectivity, heartbeat
mailboxTransport registers_with a2aProtocol as named transport 'mailbox'
hubSearch reads A2A_HUB_URL; used by mutation/solidify/explore/evolve pipeline
signals is self-contained; consumed by evolve pipeline for intent selection
personality is self-contained; consumed by mutation/solidify/evolve for state tracking
bridge is self-contained; provides session spawning primitives for GEP cycle orchestration
data_types: Gene: {id: string, type:'Gene', strategy: string[], validation: string[], schema_version, asset_id}
Capsule: {id, type:'Capsule', confidence: number, outcome: {score, blast_radius, status}, schema_version, asset_id}
EvolutionEvent: {id, type:'EvolutionEvent', capsule_id, outcome: {status, score}, intent, personality_state, meta: {at}}
ProtocolMessage: {protocol:'gep-a2a', message_type, message_id, timestamp, payload, node_id?}
PersonalityState: object normalized by normalizePersonalityState(), keyed by personalityKey()
GepPromptArtifact: {type:'GepPromptArtifact', at, cycle_id, run_id, prompt_path, meta}
important_notes: a2aProtocol.js and hubSearch.js and personality.js are obfuscated — APIs inferred from consumers and tests
mailboxTransport routes through local proxy (proxy/server/settings.getProxyUrl), not directly to hub
a2aProtocol acts as the central hub connectivity layer — most modules depend on it
signals.js is a self-contained pipeline with no external GEP module dependencies
bridge.js produces sessions_spawn(...) strings for external wrapper parsing (not direct invocation)
Transport registry pattern: registerTransport(name, {send, receive, list}) in a2aProtocol
source_files_analyzed: src/gep/a2aProtocol.js (obfuscated, API from test/a2aProtocol.test.js + consumer imports)
